## Description

<!-- SECTION:DESCRIPTION:BEGIN -->
**Background.** Preparing for a diabetes clinic appointment means manually assembling the story from various reports.

**Reason for change.** An auto-generated plain-language summary (time-in-range, average glucose, notable episodes) plus suggested questions saves prep time and surfaces what to discuss, reusing the existing PDF export.
<!-- SECTION:DESCRIPTION:END -->

## Acceptance Criteria
<!-- AC:BEGIN -->
- [x] #1 Template summary built from report models
- [x] #2 Auto-generated questions derived from the data
- [x] #3 Exports via the existing PDF pipeline
- [x] #4 LLM phrasing optional (works with no model installed)
<!-- AC:END -->

## Implementation Plan

<!-- SECTION:PLAN:BEGIN -->
- Build a template-based plain-language summary from the report models (TIR/GMI/episodes).
- Auto-generate questions from the same report models.
- Add optional LLM phrasing (must work with no model installed).
- Reuse the existing PDF pipeline for export.
- Add/extend unit tests under `test/`: summary/question generation from fixture report data; PDF export smoke test; works with no LLM.
- Verify: `flutter analyze` clean, `flutter test` green.
<!-- SECTION:PLAN:END -->

## Implementation Notes

<!-- SECTION:NOTES:BEGIN -->
- Source: ROADMAP section 4-4.4
- Effort: S–M
- Flags: 🧠 llm (optional)
- Roadmap status: open

Implemented: lib/reports/clinic_prep.dart — ClinicPrepBuilder.build(report, unit) produces a plain-language summary (TIR/GMI/mean/TBR/TAR/CV + notable episodes) and data-derived questions vs ADA/ATTD consensus targets (AC#1, AC#2). ReportExporter.buildClinicPrepPdf/shareClinicPrep reuse the existing PDF pipeline (AC#3). Optional ClinicPhraser seam with NoopClinicPhraser default + polishClinicPrep() so it works with no model installed (AC#4). UI: 'Clinic-visit prep' app-bar action on the Glucose report opens a bottom sheet (summary + questions + Share PDF). PDF text kept ASCII to render in Helvetica. Tests: test/clinic_prep_test.dart (summary/questions/units/no-LLM+phraser), glucose_report_test.dart PDF smoke, integration reports test extended. User guide updated.
<!-- SECTION:NOTES:END -->
